title: April 29th, 2022
body:
masks

 record clown lyrics

this just your every day wake up show
yesterday let the tech swaybut today it's just a blade i came to poke you with
sharpen my words, wits, and focus so my jokes could stick
heckle all you want, i'm too busy laughing to notice it
cracking up
the hackles i raise on the jackals
pocket change
why would i pay mine to yappin pups actin up
if i'm not trying to lead the pack and back it up
that's king shit
i'm down here dimwits
low lights and indigents
see the glow of indignance inna window
i let it rose in defense
like the throat of  a frog in the woods
knowing i'm blowing first chance that i get
like the dog in me think that it could
listening to the whistlin wishing it would
but it won't cuz i got a home to protect
blood from my chest
breath from my lungs
throwing in the wind
i been getting it done
crown in my head been around like the sun
circling a black hole and it ain't the only one
we know about
and we don't know shit
painting faces on stars and giving em ownership
over the ship you flying
and the ocean it's all floating in
buying the line and sinker the fleet ever deliver more than the river did
pop media paper over the pillagin
reframing the evidence
we all know laughter the best medicine
so what if your betters don't let you know when you're getting it
and all the big bettors getting in
business booming like war drums
or um, the pulse in your temple
they made a market of your mental
sold you the red light special
threw in a free t-shirt of jesus flipping the tables
caption "dis you?"
swag
no cap
no cape
i measure by what i fit in my  bag
not by the take
bones or stones how much different is that
i don't know, i'm not living like that
got a few tools i do my lot with
every thing else i use, i give it right back
or lose
the moment's allotment
go with the flow and mostly don't know my options till after i've hopped in
happy flopping cuz at least it's not a clown car with a fake bottom selling tickets with posters tickin off everyone gotten
